ddls:
CREATE TABLE "builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target architecture for the build */,
  "debian_tree" TEXT /* Debian tree version used for the build */,
  "debian_arch" TEXT /* Debian architecture type */,
  "openjdk_target" TEXT /* Target for OpenJDK build */,
  "jvm_variants" TEXT /* Variants of the JVM to be included */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the build (e.g., pending, success, failure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the build was created */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the build started */,
  "finished_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the build finished */,
  "submission_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the build */,
  "build_config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build configuration used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_target FOREIGN KEY ("target") REFERENCES targets ("target_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_openjdk_target FOREIGN KEY ("openjdk_target") REFERENCES openjdk_targets ("target_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_build_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_config_id") REFERENCES build_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_debian_tree FOREIGN KEY ("debian_tree") REFERENCES debian_trees ("tree_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_debian_arch FOREIGN KEY ("debian_arch") REFERENCES debian_architectures ("arch_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_submission_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_jvm_variants FOREIGN KEY ("jvm_variants") REFERENCES jvm_variants ("variant_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target architecture */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debian_trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Debian tree version */,
  "tree_name" TEXT /* Name of the Debian tree (e.g., buster, bullseye) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the Debian tree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debian_architectures" (
  "arch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Debian architecture */,
  "arch_name" TEXT /* Name of the architecture (e.g., i386, armhf) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "openjdk_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OpenJDK target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the OpenJDK target */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the OpenJDK target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jvm_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each JVM variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the JVM variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the JVM variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated build */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message associated with the build process */,
  "logged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log entry was created */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_logs_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the build configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the build configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the build configuration was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the build configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated build */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., success rate, failure rate) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "logged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_metrics_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated build */,
  "dependency_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependency */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_artifacts" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artifact */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated build */,
  "artifact_name" TEXT /* Name of the artifact */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the artifact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_artifacts_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)
